'''Odan-Urr's courier''' was the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]] used to travel from [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] to [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 0]] {{1st}}
